label: Vector databases & ANN indexes

node.label: Vector databases & ANN indexes
node.definition: A vector database stores embeddings with metadata and supports approximate-nearest-neighbor indexing, filtering, updates, replication, and retrieval at operational scale.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Vector databases & ANN indexes is to connect Dense vector retrieval, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including Vector-search and retrieval services.
examples: substrate for Vector-search and retrieval services
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Dense vector retrieval, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Vector databases & ANN indexes stores, selects, or obtains information through Dense vector retrieval.
Vector databases & ANN indexes uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Vector databases & ANN indexes uses Distributed systems & networking as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
